calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-19-2013 Advanced From Oct-01-13 To Aug-28-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-30-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Mangini for Elizabeth Adler.

Mr. Mangini stated that Ms. Adler does not keep time slips and that she is willing to waive extraordinary fees. Mr. Mangini also explained that the Beneficiary signed an assignment with Horner Bank on November 6, 2007 (copy of said assignment filed July 9, 2013), that Hoerner Bank already had an agreement with Estate Research Associates ("ERA") which is only for 38% (Hoerner Bank and ERA to share the 38%), that the Beneficiary will get 62% and that it was easier to have payment directly to ERA in Germany. The Court denied the request for extraordinary fees for the Administrator. The accounting petition was taken under submission for the issue of the Attorney's extraordinary fees and the issue of the assignment.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Loos. (Not Reported)
